title: CopilotKit's AI agents revolutionize app interfaces - LinkedIn
search_path_label: A 级媒体 / GDELT 路径
full_text:
Day 2 at CopilotKit, and I'm convinced I made the right call.
Day 2 at CopilotKit, and I'm convinced I made the right call.
Last month, TechCrunch covered our $27M Series A led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire to help developers deploy app-native AI agents. But what actually gets me fired up isn't the fundraise. It's the why behind it.
Most #AI in apps today is just a chatbot bolted on the side. You ask a question, you get a wall of text. CopilotKit is building something fundamentally different: agents that live inside your product, understand context, take action, and respond with interactive UIs, not paragraphs.
Ask for a revenue breakdown? You get a pie chart in your own company's design that you can actually interact with. That's the vision.
And it's already resonating. AG-UI, our open protocol for connecting agents to UIs, sees millions of installs per week and has been adopted by Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle, LangChain, and more. Customers like Deutsche Telekom, Docusign, Cisco, and S&P Global are running it in production.
I joined because this is where the next wave of software is being built.. not AI as a feature, but AI as the interface itself.
Excited to be along for the ride 🚀
https://lnkd.in/gj7cs9DC
